# fields

Field (누름틀) collection.

# fields.FieldCollection { #hwpapi.collections.fields.FieldCollection }

```python
collections.fields.FieldCollection(app)
```

``doc.fields`` — collection of HWP fields (누름틀).

Iterates as :class:`Field` value objects (not bare strings, unlike
the v1 list-compat surface). Dict-like subscript by name; numeric
subscript gives the nth :class:`Field` in document order.

## Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [filter](#hwpapi.collections.fields.FieldCollection.filter) | Return the subset of fields for which ``predicate`` is truthy. |
| [find](#hwpapi.collections.fields.FieldCollection.find) | Return the :class:`Field` with ``name`` or ``None``. |
| [get](#hwpapi.collections.fields.FieldCollection.get) | Return a field's current value, or ``default`` if missing. |
| [names](#hwpapi.collections.fields.FieldCollection.names) | All field names, document order, deduplicated. |
| [update](#hwpapi.collections.fields.FieldCollection.update) | Dict-style batch assignment. |

### filter { #hwpapi.collections.fields.FieldCollection.filter }

```python
collections.fields.FieldCollection.filter(predicate)
```

Return the subset of fields for which ``predicate`` is truthy.

### find { #hwpapi.collections.fields.FieldCollection.find }

```python
collections.fields.FieldCollection.find(name)
```

Return the :class:`Field` with ``name`` or ``None``.

### get { #hwpapi.collections.fields.FieldCollection.get }

```python
collections.fields.FieldCollection.get(name, default='')
```

Return a field's current value, or ``default`` if missing.

### names { #hwpapi.collections.fields.FieldCollection.names }

```python
collections.fields.FieldCollection.names()
```

All field names, document order, deduplicated.

### update { #hwpapi.collections.fields.FieldCollection.update }

```python
collections.fields.FieldCollection.update(mapping=None, **kwargs)
```

Dict-style batch assignment.

# fields.Field { #hwpapi.collections.fields.Field }

```python
collections.fields.Field(app, name)
```

Value object for a single HWP field (누름틀).
